subject: warp failed to read EER file properly
body:
Hi all,

We have recently acquired some data from Falcon4 in EER format. After I 
loaded them in warp, it gave me these kind of error messages:

Received "MovieProcessCTF", with 2 arguments, for GPU #0, 4471 MB free
Processed CTF for 
F:\Datasets\EER_test\FoilHole_10968936_Data_10965779_10965781_20220711_153357_EER.eer
5.592

Received "MovieProcessMovement", with 2 arguments, for GPU #0, 4465 MB free
Processed movement for 
F:\Datasets\EER_test\FoilHole_10968936_Data_10965779_10965781_20220711_153357_EER.eer
3.948

Received "MovieExportMovie", with 2 arguments, for GPU #0, 4465 MB free
Exported movie for 
F:\Datasets\EER_test\FoilHole_10968936_Data_10965779_10965781_20220711_153357_EER.eer
3.574

Received "MovieExportParticles", with 3 arguments, for GPU #0, 4470 MB free
Exported 1126 particles for 
F:\Datasets\EER_test\FoilHole_10968936_Data_10965779_10965781_20220711_153357_EER.eer
1.084

Received "LoadStack", with 3 arguments, for GPU #0, 4465 MB free
ReadDirectory: Warning, inmemory: unknown field with tag 65001 (0xfde9) 
encountered
ReadDirectory: Warning, inmemory: unknown field with tag 65002 (0xfdea) 
encountered
TIFFReadDirectory: Warning, Unknown field with tag 65001 (0xfde9) 
encountered.
TIFFReadDirectory: Warning, Unknown field with tag 65001 (0xfde9) 
encountered.

Although processing seemed to move forward, the defocus values were 
severely messed up. I tried back and the problem started at Motion 
Correction section. The same movies could be processed without any problem 
in CryoSparc. I could import the motion correct mrc from CS and perform CTF 
estimate in WARP.

At this stage, it appeared to me that WARP failed to read the latest 
Falcon4 EER movies. Does anyone have similar problem or a solution? Thanks!


Best,

Jinyi
